text.title: Learning Speed as Competitive Moat Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying learning speed as competitive moat end-to-end.

step.name: extract-beliefs
step.action: Use sonnet to extract beliefs into the register with id + statement + confidence + last_update + evidence_type.
step.decision-gate: If beliefs <3, methodology underpowered — pre-PMF stage; consider skip.

step.name: check-freshness
step.action: Run haiku to flag beliefs >90d (warn) or >180d (force-refresh).
step.decision-gate: If >50% stale, freeze new bets until refresh.

step.name: compute-velocity
step.action: Run pm-learning-velocity.py to compute p0/p1/p2 avg days + total decisions this quarter.
step.decision-gate: If p1 > 5 days avg, escalate decision-rights review.

step.name: tag-losses
step.action: Tag each loss with cause: shipped-sooner / better-evidence / wrong-belief / faster-learning.
step.decision-gate: If by_cause empty after tagging, the loss log is incomplete — fix at source.

step.name: audit-memo
step.action: Write quarterly audit memo: confidence deltas + stale flags + loss histogram + kill-criteria status.
